title: DermEngine - AI Dermatology Platform
problem: Dermatology requires visual documentation and tracking of skin lesions over time, but manual photography and tracking is inconsistent.
solution: Intelligent dermatology platform with AI-powered dermoscopy analysis, total body photography, and lesion tracking over time.
technology: AI image analysis, total body photography, dermoscopy integration, machine learning
target_customer: Dermatologists, skin cancer clinics, primary care
ai_type: Deep learning for skin lesion analysis
regulatory_notes: Medical device clearance in multiple jurisdictions
varden_fit: Moderate - Diagnostic tool with practice workflow. Good for skin cancer screening pathway.
notes: Strong AI imaging capabilities. Total body photography differentiator.
